[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000110110 4
1 0000000110 2
2 1011110000 5
3 0000001000 1
4 0011110001 5
5 0000000000 a
6 0000010001 2
7 0010000000 1
